name: CoE Starter Kit
summary: Bill Whalen's Agent Team (BWAT) starter kit as one rapplication. Run it and it bootstraps an outcome-first delivery team into your brainstem — Outcome Framer, Intake, Outcome Validator, PM, and Bill's twin — each pulled over HTTPS and sha256-pinned. Self-contained, stdlib-only, works offline after the initial fetch.
tagline: Stand up an outcome-first agent team in one drop.
